pi_items.source: setup_task.sh and task.json explicitly define this path. Downloaded dem.tif file verified as authentic raster data.
task.json explicit requirement matching output parsing logic in export_result.sh.
task.json explicit requirement matching output parsing logic in export_result.sh.
Task requires adding roughness, abs_roughness, and suitability bands via SNAP Band Maths on top of the base/smoothed elevation, establishing a minimum of 4 final bands.

privileged_info_summary: The input data is a real SRTM DEM image downloaded from the opengeos repository and saved as /home/ga/snap_data/srtm_dem.tif. Processing via SNAP requires generating at least 4 bands total (base elevation, roughness, abs_roughness, and suitability) and saving the output products to /home/ga/snap_exports/terrain_roughness.dim and /home/ga/snap_exports/terrain_roughness.tif.
